# ID-34: Task-list description discipline + content audit

Audit current 22 Tasks for description/details length + propose per-field discipline. Carryover from S62 W3 Liam concern: task-list Task descriptions trending too long (ID-30 + ID-31 descriptions ~3000+ chars each).

Guiding principle: documentation is canonical reference (`docs/specs/`, `docs/research/`, `docs/reference/`); task-list shows implementation/test steps + traceability context only. Per-field discipline TBD — distinguish what belongs in `description` (compact what+why) vs `status_note` (acute carryover state) vs `details` (Subtask-level dispatch brief slice) vs `testStrategy` (one-line acceptance) vs `cross_doc_links` (canonical-ref anchors).

## Acceptance criteria

- Audit of 22 Tasks with length distribution per field.
- Per-field discipline guidelines codified in `docs/reference/task-list-discipline.md` (or extension of `docs/reference/taskmaster-schema-reference.md`).
- workflow-orchestration / write-product-spec / write-tech-spec / planning-and-task-breakdown skills updated to honour discipline.
- One retroactive sweep tightens existing Task descriptions per new discipline.

## Dependencies

None (audit-first; can run independently of ID-30 / ID-31 spec chains).
